column1: # (spec §9; ECMA-376 §18.8.31 fraction codes). The fitted form (# ?/?,
# # ??/??) finds the best n/d within the denominator digit budget
# (1..=10^den_digits-1), preferring the smaller denominator on ties. The
# fixed form (# ?/16, # ?/8) reduces to the literal denominator.
# Rulings: an empty integer # slot blanks (leading space); ? numerator/
# denominator slots space-pad to their width (so # ??/?? of 2/3 renders
# "  2/ 3", a documented T0 alignment approximation); a numerator that
# rounds up carries into the integer. The zero-fraction blank-slot case
# (# ?/? of 4 -> "4    " with trailing spaces) is asserted in the rust test
# rather than here, to keep goldens free of trailing whitespace.
